subject: [PATCH 3/6 v3] mm/page_counter: introduce stock drain APIs

2026-06-05.patch_summary: This patch introduces two new APIs, page_counter_drain_stock_local and page_counter_drain_stock_cpu, to replace the existing memcg stock draining functions. The local drain function takes a lock to serialize against concurrent charges, while the CPU drain function does not take a lock as it is only called from the CPU hotplug path where the CPU is dead and cannot have any more charges.
